abilities.description: When you make a bio-adaptive module encoded with a creature's DNA, roll +wits. On a strong hit, the wearer adds +1 when making moves with a stat linked to the creature's main attribute [swiftness-edge; resilience-iron; kinship- heart; stealthiness-shadow; cleverness- wits]. If they roll a 1 on their action die while using the module, the effect is lost. On a weak hit, as above, but the neural feedback is disruptive; @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} [-2].

As above, and you may interface using a rare or prime-specimen module. If you do, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ff32c523829d6481]{Endure Stress} [-3] on a weak hit, and the wearer adds +2 [instead of +1].
When the wearer makes a threshold move, the module's failsafe triggers and overloads; they must reroll one die.
